# ctyun_express_connects (Data Source)
**云间高速实例列表数据源**



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_express_connects" "test" {
}

output "ctyun_express_connects_test" {
  value = data.ctyun_express_connects.test
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) 云间高速实例ID
- `page_no` (Number) 页码，从1开始
- `page_size` (Number) 每页记录数目
- `query_content` (String) 模糊匹配，支持ecID,ecName, ecDescription三个属性

### Read-Only

- `express_connects` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--express_connects))

<a id="nestedatt--express_connects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `express_connects`

Read-Only:

- `cda_count` (Number) 专线数量
- `cgw_count` (Number) 云网关数量
- `create_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `description` (String) 描述信息
- `eds_count` (Number) 云桌面网络实例数量
- `email` (String) email
- `id` (String) 云间高速实例ID
- `name` (String) 名称
- `packet_rate` (Number) 带宽包总量
- `packet_status` (Number) 带宽包状态，取值范围: 1:已购买 0:未购买
- `project` (String) 企业项目
- `sdwan_count` (Number) sdwan实例数量
- `status` (Number) 运行状态，取值范围: 1:不可用 2:可用
- `vpc_count` (Number) 添加vpc网络实例的数量
- `vpn_count` (Number) vpn实例数量
- `vrf` (Number) 云间高速vrf信息
